campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to discuss the Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority's investment report for March 2026, adopted a new policy restricting city property use for federal civil enforcement activities, and addressed open city jobs and strategies to hire and keep employees.
keyTopics: Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New policy prohibiting city property use for federal civil enforcement
City job openings and employee recruitment/retention efforts

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing to address concerns about cleaning up hazardous conditions on properties that the county identified as needing abatement work. The council approved a resolution to move forward with these cleanup orders and also adopted a new technology disruption policy to replace the existing one.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property cleanup and abatement orders
New Technology Disruption Policy adoption
Process for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial reports, authorize several contracts and agreements, and plan projects for the coming fiscal year. Key decisions included accepting a donated automated external defibrillator, awarding a paving contract, and approving grant applications.
keyTopics: Approved March 2026 financial and investment report
Authorized construction contract with O'Grady Paving
Accepted donation of automated external defibrillator (AED)
Approved grant applications for statewide funding
Set list of projects for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a meeting to review upcoming agendas and plan their workflow. The May 26 meeting was cancelled, so the council focused on organizing the June 2 agenda by adding items and setting time limits for discussions. They also updated their work plans for neighborhood services, education, and open government.
keyTopics: May 26 City Council meeting cancelled
June 2 agenda planning and item organization
Updates to Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan
Updates to Rules and Open Government Committee work plan
Event sponsorship approvals for council districts

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas for various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee applicant selection for fiscal year 2026-27
Public oral communications and citizen input
Approval of previous meeting minutes
Upcoming board and commission meeting schedules

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, to conduct city business and recognize two important observances. The council took time to honor Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month during the session.
keyTopics: Asian Pacific American Heritage Month recognition
Affordable Housing Month observance
Review of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: Cupertino's City Council met to update the city's Health and Safety plan (covering 2015-2040) and recognize the Public Works Department during Public Works Week. The council also celebrated Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Updated Health and Safety Element of the General Plan
Public Works Department recognition and services (roads, sidewalks, trees, facilities, transportation)
Asian American Pacific Islander Month celebration

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 21, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara held a special meeting of the Station Area Task Force on May 21, 2026, at City Hall to discuss development and planning issues related to transit station areas in the city.
keyTopics: Station Area Task Force special meeting convened
Meeting held at City Hall (1500 Warburton Avenue) and via Zoom
Compliance with California Brown Act transparency requirements

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting on May 19, 2026 to vote on several development and administrative matters. Key actions included approving land development permits, confirming property assessments, and appointing a new permanent City Manager.
keyTopics: New urgency ordinance and related zoning rules
Site development permit amendment and tentative map approval
Property assessment confirmation and ordering
Appointment of permanent City Manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The City Council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs designed to help the city comply with air quality regulations.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update - progress on converting homes to electric systems
Proposed principles for electrification assistance programs
Air District regulation compliance requirements
Staff presentation and council member announcements
